MINI MINUTES:
Michael Bracco, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The case is removed from arbitration and set for a short cause trial on Sep-16-2019 at 9:30am in Department 206. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Cler: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

***Defendant Thai Pham came in late and was informed by the Court re trial date. There was no objection.***
